title: Capitals and names
text: Sam Alex Maya Jake Lisa Anna Carlos Priya Diego Mei Olivia Marco Yuki Rosa David Hannah
tips: Press Shift BEFORE the letter — not after
Use the Shift on the OPPOSITE side of your letter
Names are everywhere — train them at speed

character_tips.anna: Shift before letter — opposite hand. That's the pro pattern.
character_tips.maxim: Capital letters = names + sentence starts. Train them now.
character_tips.knopych: SHIFT MOVE! 🎯 Opposite hand always — got it?
character_tips.klavochka: Tall friendly capitals, my dear — like proud trees 🌳
